title: Can I add the description function to the first column?
excerpt: Can I add the description function to the first column?

posts.author: haleyyu (haleyyu)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I add the description function to the first column?

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @haleyyu,

welcome to the monday community.

To answer your question, it itsnt possible to add a description to the first column, but we use the board description for importend notes for column one.
This is possible by clicking on the “i” next to the board title.

Hope this works for you.

~ Silas
